"Achoo!"
"All right, lad, show me what you’ve learned."
"All the world’s a stage."
"And now, pray, mark all these things well in a wise heart."
"Catastrophic failure? I prefer the term 'learning opportunity'."
"Chin up and stand tall. You’re shieldbearers of the Aegis now!"
"Don't just wait for magic to happen. Go out and make your own!"
"Dosukoi! Let’s put it in the ground!"
"Down from the skies, I come to check your rage."
"Gotta go fast!"
"I only feel alive when I hear the wind whistling in my ears."
"I think you have forgotten something. We keep a merry inn here in the greenwood, but whoever becomes our guest must pay his reckoning."
"Imagination is the discovering faculty. It is that which penetrates the unseen worlds around us."
"In a jam? Sorry, mate. Maybe a side-effect of our scrambling..."
"It seems Thoth has never seen me duel."
"I’ve a feeling we’re not in Kansas anymore."
"I’ve lifted the mist from off your eyes that’s blurred them up to now."
"I’ve seen it myself! 'Baku! Baku!', it says, eating up ghosts as though they were candies."
"Many things lie between us—shadowy mountains and sounding sea."
"My fourth Unique card? No idea what you're talking about."
"Never give up. No one knows what’s going to happen next."
"Never trust the Tanuki twice." - Lyra proverb
"One day, I will show you the wonders of Avalon and the true might of the Fae realms."
"One good turn deserves another."
"Pom! Pompoko, pom!"
"Push through the pain. Giving up would hurt far more."
"Restart turn" and "Undo last step" buttons
"Sand gives you a taste of what life is all about. Come morning, the castles you have built will be gone with the tide."
"Show me those pearly whites."
"Stay on the path, they say. I make my own path!"
"Suspira's mines will soon run dry. Your precious Kelon will run dry."
"The form has been filled out incorrectly. Please make a new appointment tomorrow."
"The most effective way to do it, is to do it."
"The pen is mightier than the sword."
"There are gates one should not open, there are seals one should not breach. And yet I will."
"This material does not seem to be affected by gravity. By harnessing the properties of this Aerolith, we could create flying ships and cities, and fly close to the clouds..."
"Wake up, you lazy furball!"
"Want to play a game of headman-hunter-fox with me? I promise not to cheat!"
"We are the sentinels of the Skein, always keeping a finger on the pulse of nature."
"We don’t inherit the earth from our ancestors, we borrow it from our children."
"We will be the arrow that pierces the veil of the unknown, the torch that banishes the mists of ignorance!"
"What do you need?"
"You can draw water out of a water-well, so I should think you could draw treacle out of a treacle-well — eh, stupid ?"
